home.recentCoursesEmpty: No course projects yet. Create a course in teacher mode to see them here.
home.recentLearningEmpty: No learning history yet. Generate or import a classroom to see it here.

identity.studentDescription: Pick this, type your requirement, and AI builds an interactive classroom
identity.teacherDescription: Pick this, type your requirement, and step into the course design flow with AI

projects.pageSubtitle: Resume design, generation, or editing where you left off.
projects.deleteConfirm: Delete course "{{title}}"? This cannot be undone.
projects.deleteFailed: Could not delete the course. Please try again.
projects.loadError: Could not load your courses. Please refresh the page.
projects.emptyDescription: Start a new course from the home page or create one here.

preview.publishingDesc: Saving generated scenes to the server…
preview.sceneGenFailed: Scene generation paused or failed. Please check your model settings and try again.
preview.gateBodyResume: A local preview draft is saved ({{scenes}} / {{outlines}} scenes). Continue generating, clear this browser draft and start over, or return to design.
preview.gateBodyPublishedOnly: This course already has a published classroom. Open the studio to keep editing it, or generate a fresh local preview draft on this device.
preview.gateBodyBoth: You have a local preview draft ({{scenes}} / {{outlines}} scenes) and a published classroom. Continue your draft, open the studio for the live version, or clear this device’s local preview and run again.
preview.softRegenerateConfirmDescription: This removes the local preview data in this browser only. The published classroom stays unchanged until you publish a new version.
preview.resumeMissingDraft: No resumable preview draft was found.

create.title: Create a course project
create.subtitle: Describe the course goal and chapter scope. You can review the generated outline before building lessons.
create.titlePlaceholder: Example: Introduction to AI for middle school
create.requirementPlaceholder: Describe learners, goals, topics, constraints, and preferred activities.
create.chapterCountHelp: Use at least 1 chapter. You can refine the outline in the next step.
create.error: Failed to create the course project. Please try again.

streamingBanner.title: AI is editing the form
streamingBanner.description: Press Stop anytime to take over.

chat.title: AI course design assistant
chat.subtitle: Describe changes to the overview or chapters; I'll sync them to the structure on the left.
chat.emptyDescription: Ask for an overview draft, new chapters, learning objectives, or audience-specific tweaks.
chat.inputHint: Enter to send, Shift + Enter for a new line

agent.systemPromptHint: Optional. Applied on top of the built-in course-design rules for this assistant only (stored in this browser).
agent.systemPromptPlaceholder: e.g. Prefer project-based learning, keep chapters to 5–7, use concise learning objectives.

chat.error: The AI failed to respond. Try again or check your model settings.
chat.cancelledFallback: You stopped the AI before it finished replying.
chat.autoAppliedHint: AI synced changes directly to the form; tweak anything you'd like.
chat.emptyReplyFallback: I've updated the form on the left.

designWorkbench.pageSubtitle: Edit the overview and chapters on the left; use the AI assistant on the right for batch changes. Generate and publish lessons chapter by chapter when ready.
designWorkbench.panelStructureHint: Overview, knowledge mounts, and chapter outline
designWorkbench.overviewHint: Summarize audience, goals, pacing, and constraints in a short brief.
designWorkbench.overviewPlaceholder: Example: A four-week intro for high school robotics clubs covering safety, basic circuits, and a capstone mini project.
designWorkbench.chaptersHint: Each chapter needs a title and at least one learning objective before generating lessons.
designWorkbench.summaryPlaceholder: Optional synopsis for the chapter card
designWorkbench.referenceMaterialsHint: Upload PDF, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Markdown, or text files to ground chapter generation.
designWorkbench.referenceMaterialsUnsupportedType: Unsupported file type. Use PDF, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Markdown, or text.
designWorkbench.referenceMaterialsLegacyFormat: Legacy .doc / .xls / .ppt files are not supported. Save as DOCX, XLSX, or PPTX.
designWorkbench.deepSearchHint: Search the web for up-to-date context before generating this chapter's outline.
designWorkbench.generationDialogDescription: Each chapter is outlined, scene content is produced, then the course is published to Studio.

flowPanel.loadFallback: Could not load workflow config; step list may be incomplete

designWorkbench.generationFailedGeneric: Generation stopped at step {{step}}. Retry after fixing the issue.

generateWorkbench.pageSubtitle: Track progress per chapter and switch chapters to preview scenes as they become ready.
generateWorkbench.previewPlaceholder: Choose a chapter and a generated scene to preview it here.
generateWorkbench.missingOutline: Add at least one chapter on the design workbench before generating lessons.
generateWorkbench.missingChapter: Chapter not found. Return to the design workbench and save your outline first.

generationSettings.title: Generation settings
generationSettings.hint: Default slide template and generation strategy for all chapters. Chapters can override these per chapter.

generationWorkflow.title: Generation workflow
generationWorkflow.hint: Default course steps and outline approval; chapters can override below.
generationWorkflow.dialogDescription: Choose a built-in preset, enable steps, and whether the outline requires approval.

slideOutputFormat.label: Slide format
slideOutputFormat.htmlHint: HTML motion preview is available in Studio only. Students still see simplified canvas slides in class.

chapterGeneration.title: Chapter generation overrides
chapterGeneration.hint: Optional overrides for this chapter. Leave empty to use course defaults.

courseTtsModel.label: Narration voice (TTS)
courseTtsModel.noProvidersHint: Configure an available TTS provider in Settings first (API key or server config required).

chapterGenerationConfig.title: Chapter generation config
chapterGenerationConfig.hint: Choose a workflow preset, steps, and template. Built-in prompts cannot be edited—only flow overrides.
chapterGenerationConfig.outlineApprovalHint: When enabled, generation pauses after the outline until you approve.

promptCatalog.slideContentDesc: Layout and copy for slide scenes
promptCatalog.htmlSlideContentDesc: Structure and copy for HTML motion slide scenes
promptCatalog.quizContentDesc: Questions and structure for quiz scenes
promptCatalog.slideActionsDesc: Speech and actions for slide scenes
promptCatalog.htmlSlideActionsDesc: Speech and actions for HTML motion slide scenes
promptCatalog.quizActionsDesc: Speech and actions for quiz scenes
promptCatalog.interactiveActionsDesc: Speech and actions for interactive scenes
promptCatalog.pblActionsDesc: Facilitation and actions for PBL scenes

promptOverride.systemPlaceholder: Markdown supported. Leave empty for built-in system; text is saved to the course flow config.
promptOverride.userPlaceholder: Markdown supported. Leave empty for built-in user; text is saved to the course flow config.

outline.title: Review and edit the outline
outline.subtitle: Generate a teacher-authored course outline, then refine chapter titles and learning objectives before continuing.
outline.unsavedHint: Save the outline before continuing to Studio.
outline.error: Failed to update the outline. Please try again.
outline.empty: No outline yet. Generate an outline to start reviewing chapters.
outline.objectivesPlaceholder: Enter one learning objective per line.
outline.objectivesHelp: Each non-empty line becomes one learning objective.

studio.unavailableDescription: Publish generated lesson content before opening the editable Studio classroom.
studio.classroomLoadError: Failed to load the editable classroom. Please try again.

assist.title: Ask for teaching suggestions
assist.description: Get a suggestion for the selected course area, then apply supported suggestions to the current scene.
assist.instructionPlaceholder: Describe what you want to improve or rewrite.
assist.error: Failed to generate a suggestion. Please try again.
assist.appliedMessage: {{scope}} suggestion applied to the current scene.
assist.unsupportedMessage: {{scope}} suggestions cannot be applied to the current scene type.

chapter.failureReasonUnknown: No error details were recorded. Retry or check your model settings.
chapter.staleGenerationReason: Generation timed out or the server stopped responding. Regenerate or resume this chapter.
chapter.failurePartialScenes: {{count}} scene(s) were saved; retry will continue from the next one.
chapter.confirmRegenerate: This chapter already has generated content. Regenerating will overwrite the existing courseware. Continue?

publishCourse.confirmDescription: Merge all published chapters into a complete course.
publishCourse.noPublishedChapters: No chapters are published yet. Please publish chapters in the Chapter Studio first.

chapterStudio.generatingBanner: Chapter is generating — preview completed scenes live

courseEditor.title: Course Editor
courseEditor.subtitle: Edit generated course content, slides, quizzes, publishing, and workflow presets
courseEditor.structureHint: Reorder, duplicate, delete, and insert scenes
courseEditor.quizEditorHint: Edit questions without affecting learner answer drafts until save
courseEditor.question: Question

default-course-generation.name: Default course generation
default-course-generation.description: Generate outlines, scenes, actions, optional media/TTS, then persist the classroom.

outline-approval.name: Outline approval
outline-approval.description: Pause for human review after the outline before generating scenes.

fast-slides.name: Fast slides
fast-slides.description: Skip media and TTS for fast editable course drafts.

slideTemplate.dialogDescription: Apply the new theme to {{count}} slide(s) and update generation settings.
slideTemplate.saveClassroomFailed: Could not save classroom — use Save manually
slideTemplate.resetTitle: Restore the default professional template style

courseEditor.videoExportDialogDescription: Combine slides and narration into a 1080p MP4.
courseEditor.videoExportMissingAudioFiles: Could not collect narration audio. Play the lesson or regenerate speech first.
courseEditor.videoExportBrowserTtsUnsupported: Browser-native TTS cannot be exported to video. Configure a TTS provider in settings.
courseEditor.videoExportNoTtsProvider: No usable TTS provider found. Configure TTS in .env or settings; export will pick one automatically.
courseEditor.redesignDirectionPlaceholder: Describe how you want to change the content, style, or structure of this scene…

lectureNotes.noNarrationYet: No narration on this page yet.
lectureNotes.emptyEditor: No scenes yet. Add a scene in the course structure panel to write notes.
lectureNotes.deleteParagraphConfirmDescription: This removes the paragraph from playback. You can undo before saving by reloading if needed.

voice.usingServerAsr: Using server-side speech recognition (browser speech service unavailable)
voice.fallbackToServerAsr: Browser speech service unreachable — switched to server ASR. Start speaking.
voice.browserNetworkUnavailable: Browser speech requires Chrome/Edge online recognition. Use Chrome or Edge with network access, or switch to a server ASR provider (e.g. Whisper) in Settings.
voice.browserNotSupported: This browser does not support Web Speech recognition. Use Chrome or Edge.
voice.browserStartFailed: Failed to start browser speech recognition

settings.maxTurnsDesc: The maximum number of discussion turns between agents (each agent completes actions and reply counts as one turn)

knowledgeBase.title: Knowledge base
knowledgeBase.subtitle: Organize reference files for course generation
knowledgeBase.deleteConfirm: Delete this item and all contents?
knowledgeBase.importFallback: AI planning unavailable — using a default folder layout. Review and apply the plan.
knowledgeBase.selectNodeHint: Select a file or folder to view details
knowledgeBase.folderSelected: Folder selected — use tree actions to manage contents

design.title: Plan & design
design.subtitle: Browse and manage files in a cloud-drive layout

drive.empty: This folder is empty — upload files or create a folder

assistant.title: AI assistant
assistant.subtitle: Upload files, plan folders, and move items
assistant.welcome: I can help organize your knowledge base. Upload files or describe how you want folders arranged (e.g. move PDFs into a “Textbooks” folder).
assistant.inputPlaceholder: Describe how to organize files, or attach files to import…
assistant.errorReply: Something went wrong. Check model settings and try again.
assistant.modelRequired: Configure a model in Settings before sending text instructions

knowledgeBase.emptyTree: No files yet. Upload or import to get started.

picker.label: Knowledge base
picker.noNodes: No files in knowledge base yet

courseMount.title: Course knowledge sources
courseMount.hint: Referenced files are not copied. Chapter uploads remain available as supplements.
courseMount.saveFailed: Failed to update course knowledge sources

chapterMount.title: Chapter knowledge sources
chapterMount.hint: Attach library files or folders for this chapter. They merge with course-level mounts and local uploads when generating lessons.

slideTemplates.title: Slide templates
slideTemplates.subtitle: Manage built-in, global, and project slide themes and layouts
slideTemplates.missingTemplateWarning: Slide template(s) not found ({{ids}}). Using the default template instead.
slideTemplates.previewHint: Sample slide showing theme colors, typography, and content blocks.
slideTemplates.previewBullet1: Title and body text use the template fonts and colors
slideTemplates.previewBullet2: Charts and accents follow the theme palette
slideTemplates.previewBullet3: Content blocks use coordinated fill colors below
slideTemplates.editJsonDescription: Advanced editing for theme, layouts, and metadata. Save to apply changes.
slideTemplates.deleteConfirm: Delete this template? This cannot be undone.
slideTemplates.forkHint: Copy into a course project for local editing without changing the source.
slideTemplates.forkProjectIdRequired: Enter a project ID to fork

devUi.subtitle: Developer view — full prompts, stacks, and raw JSONL download. Teacher views stay redacted.

detail.devDisabled: Developer trace UI is disabled on this server.
